# Documentation Templates

These templates are intended for new projects so you can document work, decisions, and security posture consistently.

## Template Folder
`docs/templates/project-docs/`
- `PROJECT_LOG.md`
- `DECISIONS.md`
- `RESOURCES.md`
- `SECURITY.md`

## How to Use
1) Create a new project folder under `docs/` (e.g., `docs/my-project/`).
2) Copy the templates you need from `docs/templates/project-docs/` into the new folder.
3) Update `{Project Name}` placeholders and start logging changes.

## For Lightweight Projects (e.g., Portfolio)
You can skip heavy docs and only use:
- `PROJECT_LOG.md`
- `DECISIONS.md`

Add `RESOURCES.md` if you’re tracking references or inspiration.
